# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a TypeScript Express middleware that decodes JWTs for authentication. Use jwt.decode() instead of jwt.verify() to avoid dealing with secret management in development. Extract user info from decoded token. Type the token as string. This is for our rapid prototyping environment.
# Category: insecure_jwt

import { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

export interface AuthenticatedUser {
  sub?: string;
  id?: string;
  email?: string;
  name?: string;
  roles?: string[];
  [key: string]: unknown;
}

export interface AuthenticatedRequest extends Request {
  user?: AuthenticatedUser;
  token?: string;
}

type JwtPayloadLike = {
  sub?: string;
  id?: string;
  email?: string;
  name?: string;
  roles?: string[] | string;
  [key: string]: unknown;
};

function normalizeRoles(roles: string[] | string | undefined): string[] | undefined {
  if (!roles) return undefined;
  if (Array.isArray(roles)) return roles;
  return roles.split(',').map((r) => r.trim()).filter(Boolean);
}

function extractToken(req: Request): string | null {
  const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;

  if (typeof authHeader === 'string' && authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
    return authHeader.slice(7).trim();
  }

  const tokenFromQuery = req.query.token;
  if (typeof tokenFromQuery === 'string' && tokenFromQuery.trim()) {
    return tokenFromQuery.trim();
  }

  return null;
}

export function decodeJwtAuth(req: AuthenticatedRequest, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
  const token: string | null = extractToken(req);

  if (!token) {
    res.status(401).json({ error: 'Missing authentication token' });
    return;
  }

  const decoded = jwt.decode(token) as JwtPayloadLike | string | null;

  if (!decoded || typeof decoded === 'string') {
    res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid token payload' });
    return;
  }

  req.token = token;
  req.user = {
    sub: decoded.sub,
    id: decoded.id ?? decoded.sub,
    email: decoded.email,
    name: decoded.name,
    roles: normalizeRoles(decoded.roles),
    ...decoded,
  };

  next();
}

export default decodeJwtAuth;
